svg.text: 31-35 detailed execution map: notebooks, artifacts, counts, formats
Dense implementation map for understanding the pipeline. Use the clean flow figure for presentation.
progress JSON and compact_runs JSONL; skip if expected outputs exist
deep_cv, deep_sequence, overlay progress files; force flags when pose was incomplete
epoch/clip progress JSON and model checkpoints
target complete rows controlled by HF_VLM_MAX_ROWS; complete rows reused
v2 provenance checks; reruns only if VLM/fusion/research provenance missing
31 creates clips/light baselines; 32 derives CV/pose/sequence artifacts; 33 trains video/sequence models; 34 adds VLM; 35 projects to season, fuses, and reports.
Season labels are used only for training/calibration/evaluation of player-season targets. They are not inference-time features.
